title: mesosphaerum oppositifolium
intro: Mesosphaerum oppositifolium, also known as Mexican tea or false pennyroyal, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum oppositifolium include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine. Mesosphaerum oppositifolium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and alleviate various health issues.
